<!-- Keep PRs small and focused: one coherent change. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the ticket/issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO).
- [ ] CI is green (rust: fmt/clippy/test · typescript · python · dashboard).
- [ ] Tests cover the change (unit / property / integration / e2e as appropriate).
- [ ] No money computed outside the engine; ledger stays append-only; values are exact decimals.
- [ ] `README.md`, `docs/`, and `tickets/` updated if behavior or scope changed.
- [ ] No AI-attribution trailers or "generated by" lines anywhere.
